vocab.meaning: kho tàng quý giá (về thông tin/kiến thức)
vocab.example: YouTube is a treasure trove of tutorials, covering everything from complex coding to culinary arts.

vocab.meaning: sự tiện lợi vô song/không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: Amazon offers unparalleled convenience, allowing me to procure daily essentials with just a few clicks.

vocab.meaning: sự phong phú/dồi dào về cái gì đó
vocab.example: Medium is my favorite site because it provides a wealth of thought-provoking articles from independent writers.

vocab.meaning: thu hút thị giác mạnh mẽ
vocab.example: I’m a frequent visitor of Behance, as the portfolio designs there are truly visually arresting.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa/hợp lý hóa (quy trình)
vocab.example: I rely on Notion to streamline my workflow and keep my academic projects meticulously organized.

vocab.meaning: được thiết kế riêng/may đo theo yêu cầu
vocab.example: The recommendations on Spotify are tailor-made to my musical taste, which keeps me coming back daily.
Stack Overflow is an indispensable tool for me whenever I encounter a particularly stubborn bug in my code.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond its functionality, Pinterest’s aesthetic appeal makes it my go-to destination for home decor inspiration.

vocab.meaning: bố cục dễ hiểu/dễ sử dụng
vocab.example: The New York Times website has an intuitive layout that makes reading long-form journalism a breeze.

vocab.meaning: làm cho tôi bị cuốn hút/mê mẩn
vocab.example: The sheer variety of content on Reddit never fails to keep me hooked for hours on end.
